query: SELECT ds.saleDate, l.name, ds.taxExemptSales, ds.taxableSales, ds.totalSales, (ds.taxExemptSales + ds.taxableSales) as expectedTotal FROM dailySales ds LEFT JOIN locations l ON ds.locationId = l.id WHERE ds.locationId IN (1, 2, 4) AND ds.totalSales != (ds.taxExemptSales + ds.taxableSales) AND ds.taxableSales > 0;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT ds.saleDate, l.name, ds.taxExemptSales, ds.taxableSales, ds.totalSales, (ds.taxExemptSales + ds.taxableSales) as expectedTotal FROM dailySales ds LEFT JOIN locations l ON ds.locationId = l.id WHERE ds.locationId IN (1, 2, 4) AND ds.totalSales != (ds.taxExemptSales + ds.taxableSales) AND ds.taxableSales > 0;
